name: Lisas' Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 2 links sweet or hot Italian Sausage, cooked and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the mushrooms using a mushroom brush or a damp paper towel; do not wash them in water as this makes them watery.
2. Remove stems from the mushrooms and sauté in about 1 tablespoon of butter until slightly cooked. Set aside on a cookie sheet upside down.
3. In a food processor or blender, chop the green onions. Add and pulse the cooked sausage until crumbled into small pieces.
4. Add softened cream cheese and grated parmesan cheese to the mixture and blend thoroughly until combined.
5. Use a spoon or piping bag to mound the filling onto the mushroom caps.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes.
7. Switch the oven to broil mode and brown the tops lightly.
8. Serve hot.
